name: HP
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of HP's design language — a white-paper enterprise-consumer system anchored by HP Electric Blue (#024ad8) as the lone signal CTA, near-black ink (#1a1a1a) for headlines, geometric Forma-DJR sans throughout, and angular blue-chevron decorations that nod to the HP wordmark's slashes.
trademark_signals: Pure white canvas with deep ink running every body surface; light fog bands (, ) alternate for section rhythm
HP Electric Blue is the lone CTA fill and link color; it appears at most twice per viewport
Bespoke Forma DJR Micro across every surface — display, body, button, caption — at weights 400 / 500 / 600 / 700
Cards round at (16px) for product/pricing tiles; buttons sit at (4px) with capitalize labels
Geometric blue chevrons ( rectangles cut at 45°) frame hero photography and reinforce the wordmark
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce secondary saturated colors outside family + the bloom-coral sale-tag and storm printer-plan accents
Don't round buttons above (4px); a soft 8px+ button reads as a different brand
